candidates.qualitative_summary: LiDAR sensor company with zero portfolio overlap, 10-13 approaches at each active level, and B1 entry within 0.3% of current price. Ideal entry timing with 100% hold reserve floor at $17.28.

Bitcoin miner identical in sub-sector to APLD/CIFR/CLSK; adding IREN would push Crypto to 4x and create a 54% dead zone with no practical reserve rescue. Do not onboard until one Crypto position closes.

D-Wave quantum annealing provides genuine sub-sector differentiation from IONQ's trapped-ion approach; all 4 active levels showing improving recency with 11% active-reserve gap and B1 within 1.9% of current price.

Mechanically strong with improving recency and excellent reserves, but the same Crypto sector block as IREN applies; HUT8 is a BTC miner identical in business model to existing APLD/CIFR/CLSK positions.
Strongest recency improvement in the screen with multiple levels at 100% recent hold, but B1 is 8.6% away and onboarding alongside QBTS would push Quantum to 3x concentration.
CRISPR gene editing adds genuine diversification but the active zone is choppy with two deteriorating levels and binary FDA event risk that can gap through the 26% dead zone in a single session.

Three consecutive active levels dropped to 0% recent hold rate from 29-54% historical averages, indicating structural support breakdown; thin reserve layer (0 levels at 40%+ hold) provides no safety net.
